description.value: Infused with primal magic, you can use your glowing pigment to dazzle your enemies in a spray of glittering paint. You can cast revealing light as a 2nd-rank primal innate spell. You can't use @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Revealing Light] again until you spend 1 hour to forage for new pigments. It takes only 10 minutes to find these pigments if you're in an environment with a plethora of minerals appropriate for your paint, such as an underground cave or a vehicle paint and auto body shop.
